entity.summary: MetaDEX and concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange built for Linea and the broader Ethereum ecosystem, with core exchange contracts and current protocol infrastructure maintained under the Etherex Finance organization.
entity.notes: Current first-party website identifies Etherex as a concentrated-liquidity DEX on Linea. The official Etherex Finance organization publishes the core contract repository and protocol assets. HEI consolidates base, duplicate, concentrated-liquidity, and legacy discovery rows under one entity.

evidence.title: Etherex official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Etherex as a concentrated-liquidity DEX on Linea.

evidence.title: Etherex Core contracts repository
evidence.notes: Official Etherex Finance organization repository identifies Etherex as a MetaDEX built for Linea and the broader Ethereum ecosystem and links the current official website.

evidence.title: Etherex DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: June 2026 DEX candidate corpus identifies Etherex and related concentrated-liquidity and legacy source rows; HEI consolidates those representations into one entity.
